title: ernstamra scorpioides

constituents: Ernstamra scorpioides has many active constituents, such as flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. side_effects: Ernstamra scorpioides can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea and vomiting in individuals who ingest its toxic compounds.
